text.title: Trunk-Based CI Gates Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for trunk-based-ci-gates.

conclusion.verdict: fast hooks only (lint + format + secret-scan); no test runner
parallelise + cache + nightly slow tier; target p95 < 10 min
required reviews + all jobs + linear history + restrict direct push
bot revert within 15 min; fix-forward in fresh PR

text.example: gate=branch_protection → required reviews=1, required-status=[lint,typecheck,test,build,gitleaks], linear history, no direct push. Rule: branch-protection-required-status-complete.
